overview: A modern, premium Hotel Management System for multi-property hotel groups. Features a full suite of modules including reservations, front desk check-in/out, housekeeping, billing with GST compliance, channel management, analytics, guest CRM, and admin settings — all with a high-end dark SaaS UI with amber/gold accents.
features: Multi-property dashboard with KPI cards and live activity feed
Reservation management with calendar view, Gantt timeline, and booking CRUD
Front desk check-in/check-out with walk-in support
Housekeeping room status board with staff assignment and task tracking
Billing and invoicing with GST-compliant folios and multiple payment methods
Channel manager for OTA inventory and rate management
Reports and analytics with occupancy trends, revenue charts, and key hotel metrics
Guest CRM with profiles, stay history, tags, notes, and loyalty points
Settings and user management with role-based access control
Admin management panel for full CRUD of rooms, staff, guests, and bookings
